core_mechanism: central (2-cocycle) extension of an infinite-dimensional transformation/mapping group and the classification of its coadjoint-action orbits by invariants (the orbit method)
brief_reason: The paper constructs central extensions of the group of maps from a surface into a Lie group and studies the coadjoint action, whose orbits are labelled by moduli/invariants, which is the cocycle-extension-plus-coadjoint-orbit machinery.
